title: AI Red Team
description: Run adversarial exposure validation against LLM models and AI agents (prompt injection, jailbreak, data exfiltration, tool abuse, MCP) mapped to MITRE ATLAS and OWASP, with NVIDIA Garak, Microsoft PyRIT and Promptfoo engines.
short_description: Adversarial testing of LLMs and AI agents (MITRE ATLAS / OWASP)
